iTPanel.successMessage: Account created for {{email}}. They can now sign in.
iTPanel.noPermission: You don't have permission to create users.
iTPanel.noPermissionRequired: Required: Users & Authentication → User Accounts → Create User
iTPanel.headerDescription: New accounts can only be created here by an IT administrator. Users cannot self-register.
iTPanel.notePart1: After creating the account, go to the
iTPanel.notePart2: tab to assign module access and permissions to the new user.

permissionBrowser.selectPermissionHint: Select a permission on the left to see who has it
permissionBrowser.noEligibleUsers: No eligible users (all users already have this permission or lack prerequisites)
permissionBrowser.noHolders: No users have this permission yet
permissionBrowser.name: Name

userDetail.accountActiveDesc: This account is active. Deactivating will prevent the user from logging in.
userDetail.accountInactiveDesc: This account is inactive. Reactivating will restore login access.
userDetail.resetPasswordDesc: Set a new password for this user. They will need to use this password on their next login.
userDetail.noAuthAccount: This user has no linked Supabase Auth account. Password reset is not available.
userDetail.notifIntro1: Control which emails this user receives. Enable
userDetail.notifIntro3: to let the user turn it on/off in their own Account Settings (otherwise it is enforced).
userDetail.enableModuleHint: Enable a module on the left to configure permissions

userAuditLog.title: User Activity Log
userAuditLog.retentionNote: Account & permission events, plus sign-ins. Records are kept for 2 years.
userAuditLog.searchPlaceholder: Search by actor, target or summary…
userAuditLog.noPermission: You don't have permission to view this log.
